title: HP Inc. (HPQ) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: HP Inc. (NYSE:HPQ ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call February 28, 2023 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Orit Keinan-Nahon - Head of Investor Relations Enrique Lores - President and Chief Executive Officer Marie Myers - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Shannon Cross - Credit Suisse AG Erik Woodring - Morgan Stanley Ananda Baruah - Loop Capital Markets LLC David Vogt - UBS Toni Sacconaghi - Sanford C. Bernstein & Co. Sidney Ho - Deutsche Bank AG James Suva - Citigroup Inc. Operator Good day, everyone, and welcome to the First Quarter 2023 HP Inc. Earnings Conference Call.

title: February Closes a Down Month; HPQ, AMC, FSLR & More Report
text: February was a fairly volatile month overall, but has been in negative territory for the past week and a half or so.

title: HP (HPQ) Surpasses Q1 Earnings Estimates
text: HP (HPQ) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 1.35% and 2.10%, respectively, for the quarter ended January 2023. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: HP holiday earnings chopped in half, CEO says ‘we continue to see a slowdown' in PC sales
text: HP Inc.'s stock rose slightly Tuesday after the personal-computer maker reported quarterly earnings that beat Wall Street estimates despite a steep drop in revenue and GAAP earnings being cut in half.

title: HP Posts Mixed Results as Weak PC Sales Take a Toll
text: The company is still feeling the aftershocks of the explosion of demand during the Covid-19 outbreak—a boom which has now reversed course.

title: HP Inc. Reports Fiscal 2023 First Quarter Results
text: PALO ALTO, Calif., Feb. 28, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HP (NYSE: HPQ)

title: 86% of Warren Buffett's $5.4 Billion Secret Portfolio Is Invested in Only 4 Stocks
text: Berkshire Hathaway owns a specialty investment firm that oversees a highly concentrated $5.4 billion portfolio.

title: HP Will Become A Utility, And That's Fine
text: HP lost almost 30% from its high in April 2022, when Berkshire Hathaway announced its investment. The share price now of USD 29 is almost 15% lower than the average entry price for Berkshire.

title: 4 February Buffett Dividend Dog Buys + 4 To Watch
text: This Buffett holdings list from Kiplinger first appeared 2/14/23 on line. YCharts and Dogs of The Dow both track this Buffett/Berkshire batch. Here is your update from 2/23/23 YCharts data. 33 of 49 current Berkshire-Hathaway-owned-stocks pay dividends. As of 2/23/23, the top-ten ranged 3.06%-4.10% by annual-yield and 47 of 49 ranged -9.13% to 77.51% per broker-estimated target-price-upsides.

title: What's in the Offing for HP Inc. (HPQ) This Earnings Season?
text: HP Inc.'s (HPQ) first-quarter fiscal 2023 performance is likely to have witnessed a negative impact of the weak consumer demand for PCs, high inventory levels and unfavorable currency exchange rates.

title: 9 February Inflation-Busting Ideal Dividend Dogs
text: March-April, 2022, UBS, Kiplinger, and Barron's analysts and reporters combined to list five sets of stocks sorted as: “Inflation Busters.” Those five articles revealed 48 equities, with 43 paying-dividends.

title: 5 Stocks In The Dividend Growth Sweet Spot
text: Finding companies with a high initial yield and rapid dividend growth is difficult. I present my criteria for finding such companies. At present, there are 16 companies meeting my initial screening requirements. Using additional metrics, these are reduced to five.

title: HP Engineers Extreme Performance with Z By HP
text: Breaking boundaries for professional creators, designers, engineers, and data scientists with new Z by HP Desktop portfolio and HP Anyware Remote System Controller Breaking boundaries for professional creators, designers, engineers, and data scientists with new Z by HP Desktop portfolio and HP Anyware Remote System Controller

title: Warren Buffett's little-known stock portfolio worth more than $5 billion nearly mirrored Berkshire Hathaway's trades last quarter. Here are its top holdings.
text: New England Asset Management sold a big chunk of US Bancorp and all of its Bank of New York Mellon stake, similar to Berkshire Hathaway's trades.

title: Warren Buffett owns a little-known stock portfolio worth nearly $6 billion. These are the portfolio's top 10 stock holdings.
text: The portfolio is managed by New England Asset Management, which was acquired by Berkshire Hathaway in 1998 through its $22 billion General Re buyout.

title: The 7 Best Beaten-Down Warren Buffett Stocks to Buy
text: When it comes to Warren Buffett stocks to buy, the quintessential purchase is Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK-B ). After all, when you buy shares in Berkshire, you not only get a bunch of great operating businesses like BNSF Railway, Geico, Berkshire Energy and so many more, but you also get an equity portfolio currently worth more than $350.5 billion.

title: HP Inc. to Announce First Quarter Fiscal 2023 Earnings on February 28, 2023
text: PALO ALTO, Calif., Feb. 06, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ) will present a live audio webcast of a conference call to review financial results for the first fiscal quarter ended January 31, 2023 on Tuesday, February 28, 2023 at 5:00 p.m. ET / 2:00 p.m. PT.
